content: write me a C# script that can make a ball change colors every time it hits the paddle in unity
make it so that the ball changes colors every 0.5 seconds
the ball is not changing colors
there is an error that says: "The type or namespace name 'ballRenderer' could not be found (are you missing a using directive or an assembly reference?)" how do i fix this?
I already have a ball game object created, how do I reference the ball to that game object in this script?
how do i make the ball grow in size by 2 for 0.5 seconds after hitting the paddle?
